zh.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特
zh.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun是Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron和Mrs Reginald II de Mohun的女兒，於1232年出生在英國英格蘭薩默塞特登斯特。她於1255年之前與John de Grey在英國結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1297年享年65歲，埋葬在英國德比夏爾可德諾。

zh-hans.Dunster, Somerset, England: 英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特
zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun是Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron和Mrs Reginald II de Mohun的女儿，于1232年出生在英国英格兰薩默塞特登斯特。她于1255年之前与John de Grey在英国结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1297年享年65岁，埋葬在英国德比夏爾可德諾。

nameMeanings.name: Mohun
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Moon
meanings: English (of Norman origin): habitational name from Moyon in La Manche. Compare   Mounce  .
Americanized form of German   Mohn   or of some other similar (like-sounding) surname.

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Old French Lucie, the vernacular form of Lucia . It is sometimes assumed that Lucy is a pet form of Lucinda , but there is no etymological justification for this assumption. It was in fairly widespread use in the Middle Ages, and increased greatly in popularity in the 18th century and again in the 1990s. In Ireland it serves as an Anglicized form of Irish Luíseach .

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

en.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun was born in 1232, in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron and Mrs Reginald II de Mohun. She married John de Grey before 1255, in England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1297, at the age of 65, and was buried in Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun est née en 1232, à Dunster, Somerset, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, fille de Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron et Mrs Reginald II de Mohun. Elle a épousé John de Grey avant 1255, à Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1297, à l’âge de 65 ans, et a été enterrée à Codnor, Derbyshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun wurde 1232 in Dunster, Somerset, England, United Kingdom, als Tochter von Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron und Mrs Reginald II de Mohun geboren. Sie hat vor 1255 in England John de Grey geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb 1297 im Alter von 65 Jahren und wurde in Codnor, Derbyshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun è nata il nel 1232 nel Dunster, Somerset, Inghilterra, Regno Unito come figlia di Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron e Mrs Reginald II de Mohun. Lei sposato John de Grey prima del 1255, nel England. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1297, all'età di 65 anni, e fu sepolta a Codnor, Derbyshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohunは1232年にイギリスイギリスソメルセトダンスターでReginald II de Mohun 6th BaronとMrs Reginald II de Mohunの娘として生まれた。1255年以前にイギリスでJohn de Greyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1297年に65歳で死去し，イギリスデルブイシュアイアコドノーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun(은)는 1232년 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 던스터에서 Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron(와)과 Mrs Reginald II de Mohun의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1255년 이전 영국에서 John de Grey(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1297년 65세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 더비실르 코드너에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun nasceu em 1232, em Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, United Kingdom filha de Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron e Mrs Reginald II de Mohun. Ela casou-se com John de Grey antes 1255, em Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1297, com 65 anos, e foi sepultada em Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun родилась в 1232 г. в местности дунстир, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron и Mrs Reginald II de Mohun. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John de Grey перед 1255 г. в местности Англия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1297 г. в возрасте 65 лет и была похоронена в местности коднор, дирбишир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Lucy Mohun nació en 1232, en Dunster, Somerset, Inglaterra, Reino Unido como hija de Reginald II de Mohun 6th Baron y Mrs Reginald II de Mohun. Se casó con John de Grey antes de 1255, en Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió en 1297, a la edad de 65 años, y fue sepultada en Codnor, Derbyshire, Inglaterra.
